rows.evidence_quote: Agents' Last Exam (default): Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview = 32.1%.

rows.protocol_note: For Workspace Bench, first number is Total, followed by Pass@30 / Pass@50 / Pass@70 / Pass@90 / Pass@100 under the 100-task OpenClaw setting. For Agents Last Exam, results are Pass@1 / Score. OfficeQA-Pro includes implementation/adaptation changes; scores may fluctuate versus official leaderboard.
